transform: Assign disposition and caveat flags per policy.
Build UI-safe payload by excluding internal-only fields and applying caveat-specific SP handling.
Emit index + per-guide artifacts with provenance metadata.

hard_fail: Any output guide missing required identity/provenance/quality fields.
Policy violation: SP rows emitted for guides with sp_unusable flag.
Output guide count differs from manifest total (115).
Hash/version mismatch against referenced schema/policy versions.

tests: Unit: policy classifier for disposition/sp_status/caveat flags.
Integration: full corpus build produces 115 guide records and expected count anchors.
Regression: compare counts against PROGRAM_GUIDE_CORPUS_MANIFEST.json anchors.

gating_decision.reason: Policy/schema are now settled; skeleton allows safe implementation kickoff without shipping runtime integration in same session.
